name: Cheese & Rice Casserole Ada
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a lightly oiled casserole dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
From the ADA Holiday Cookbook by Dr. Betty Wedman.
One serving = 1 bread exchange + 1 lean meat exchange + 1/2 milk exchange (35 cal, 35 CHO, 14 PRO, 4 fat, 682 Na, 203 K, 10 Cholest).
